items.content_statement: Name and identify a range of emotions
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge - emotion vocabulary and recognition skills with clear correct/incorrect answers

items.content_statement: Understand that emotions impact thoughts and behaviors
items.classification_rationale: Conceptual understanding of causal relationships - propositional knowledge about how emotions function

items.content_statement: Identify interests and personal strengths inside and outside of the school setting
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear criteria for accurate self-assessment

items.content_statement: Explain how practice improves the performance of a skill and that practice can help us overcome a challenge or setback
items.classification_rationale: Conceptual understanding of practice-improvement relationship - propositional knowledge about learning

items.content_statement: Identify personal challenges and advocate for personal needs by asking for help
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for self-advocacy - reasoning quality determines effectiveness

items.content_statement: Identify and use safe, kind, and helpful ways to express emotions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when emotional expression situations arise - multiple valid approaches exist, quality of reasoning determines effectiveness

items.content_statement: Recognize when they are experiencing uncomfortable emotions and practice strategies to self and/or co-regulate
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill deployed when uncomfortable emotions arise - involves recognition and strategic response

items.content_statement: Practice setting goals and name simple steps that support academic success and personal growth
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear steps and criteria for goal-setting and planning

items.content_statement: Describe something they have accomplished
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear criteria for describing accomplishments

items.content_statement: Advocate for their needs and ask for help in safe and kind ways
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when advocacy situations arise - multiple valid approaches, quality depends on reasoning about context and approach

items.content_statement: Show creativity and persistence when seeking solutions to problems
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation that operates by default across contexts - creativity and persistence are enacted qualities observable over time

items.content_statement: Discuss how people can be the same or different
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when discussion situations arise - requires reasoning about human similarities and differences through multiple lenses

items.content_statement: Understand that facial and body cues can communicate different emotions in different people
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about how nonverbal communication works - factual understanding that can be assessed through explanation

items.content_statement: Understand that fair does not mean that everyone gets the same thing
items.classification_rationale: Conceptual understanding about fairness - propositional knowledge that can be assessed through explanation and application

items.content_statement: Define empathy
items.classification_rationale: Factual knowledge - vocabulary definition that can be assessed through knowledge test

items.content_statement: Identify empathetic reactions in others
items.classification_rationale: Analytical skill deployed when observing social situations - requires reasoning about behavioral cues and emotional responses

items.content_statement: Explain what gratitude is
items.classification_rationale: Factual knowledge - conceptual explanation that can be assessed through knowledge test

items.content_statement: Express gratitude in their classroom and school community
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill deployed when appropriate situations arise - requires reasoning about context and appropriate expression

items.content_statement: Recognize and identify possible ways to improve situations
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when problem situations arise - requires reasoning through multiple potential solutions and their consequences

items.content_statement: Describe the behaviors of a friend
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about friendship behaviors - factual content to be understood

items.content_statement: Practice building and maintaining relationships
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation - building and maintaining relationships operates as default behavior across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Demonstrate collaborative behaviors in a group (e.g., listens, encourages, acknowledges opinions, compromises, and reaches consensus)
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - collaborative behaviors deployed when group situations call for them

items.content_statement: Effectively communicate needs, wants, and ideas in a respectful manner
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - communication deployed when situations require expressing needs, wants, or ideas

items.content_statement: Use positive communication and behaviors such as: active listening, accountable talk, taking turns, sharing with others, using compliments to encourage others
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - positive communication behaviors deployed when interpersonal situations call for them

items.content_statement: Identify if there is a problem in a relationship and ask for help as needed to resolve the problem
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - problem identification and help-seeking deployed when relationship difficulties arise

items.content_statement: Identify and name feelings and problems when in a conflict situation
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - emotional identification deployed when conflict situations arise

items.content_statement: Display curiosity about personal and social challenges
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - curiosity as an enacted capacity that operates by default across contexts

items.content_statement: Determine the size of a problem
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when a situation calls for it - assessing problem magnitude through reasoning

items.content_statement: Identify strategies to solve a problem
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when a situation calls for it - generating solutions through reasoning

items.content_statement: Recognize that they have choices in how to respond in a situation and that all choices have consequences
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge - conceptual understanding about choice and consequence relationships

items.content_statement: Name ways to contribute to our school, home, and community
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability - generating contribution strategies through reasoning about contexts

items.content_statement: Describe ways to practice safety to support academic, physical, and emotional well-being
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge - factual content about safety practices and their purposes
